flowchart TD
    A[开始写入操作] --> B{获取当前快照}
    B --> C[基于快照计算变更]
    C --> D{存在写冲突?}
    D -->|是| E{重试次数 < 阈值?}
    E -->|是| F[等待并重试]
    F --> B
    E -->|否| G[中止操作]
    D -->|否| H[生成新元数据]
    H --> I[原子性提交到日志]
    I --> J{提交成功?}
    J -->|是| K[写入完成]
    J -->|否| L[冲突检测失败]
    L --> E
    G --> M[返回错误]
    K --> N[通知订阅者]

    style K fill:#90EE90
    style G fill:#FFB6C1
    style M fill:#FFB6C1

    A[选择增量格式] --> B{主要使用场景?}

    B -->|多引擎支持| D{写入模式?}

    D -->|批量写入为主| F[Iceberg]

    C --> G{部署环境?}
    G -->|Databricks| H[原生Delta Lake]
    G -->|自建集群| I[开源Delta Lake]

    E --> J{延迟要求?}
    J -->|毫秒级| K[MOR表类型]
    J -->|秒级| L[COW表类型]

    F --> M{查询引擎?}
    M -->|Flink为主| N[Iceberg + Flink]
    M -->|Trino为主| O[Iceberg + Trino]

    H --> P[最优选择]
    I --> P
    K --> P
    L --> P
    N --> P
...

sequenceDiagram
    participant F as Flink Task
    participant B as 微批次缓冲区
    participant DL as Delta Log
    participant S3 as 对象存储

    F->>B: 累积批次(5秒/10MB)
    B->>B: 批次满触发写入
    B->>S3: 写入数据文件(Parquet)
    S3-->>B: 返回文件路径
    B->>DL: 读取当前版本元数据
    DL-->>B: 返回当前快照
    B->>B: 计算新文件集合
    B->>S3: 写入新元数据文件
    B->>DL: 原子性提交(_delta_log/n.json)
    alt 提交成功
        DL-->>B: ACK
        B->>F: 批次确认
    else 冲突检测失败
        DL-->>B: Conflict
        B->>DL: 重试(获取新版本)
        DL-->>B: 返回最新快照
       ...

graph TB subgraph "数据源层" K[Kafka/Pulsar] DB[(关系型数据库)] API[API/日志] end subgraph "摄取层" CDC[CDC连接器] FLink[Flink实时流] Spark[Spark批处理] end subgraph "流数据湖存储" subgraph "元数据层" Meta[(元数据存储
Hive/Glue)] Log[事务日志
_delta_log]<->Meta end subgraph "数据层" Data1[数据文件
Parquet/ORC] Data2[数据文件
Parquet/ORC] Data3[数据文件
Parquet/ORC] end ...

    Classify -->|作业失败| FailDiag[检查 JM 日志]
    Classify -->|性能下降| PerfDiag[检查 Metrics]
    Classify -->|数据问题| DataDiag[检查数据质量]

    FailDiag --> FailType{错误类型?}
    FailType -->|OOM| OOMFix[内存优化]
    FailType -->|Exception| CodeFix[代码修复]
    FailType -->|Timeout| TimeoutFix[超时配置]

    PerfDiag --> PerfType{性能瓶颈?}
    PerfType -->|背压| BackpressureFix[背压处理]
    PerfType -->|倾斜| SkewFix[倾斜处理]
    PerfType -->|GC| GCFi...

flowchart TD
    Start([开始升级]) --> CheckBlue{Blue 运行正常?}
    CheckBlue -->|否| Abort[中止升级]
    CheckBlue -->|是| DeployGreen[部署 Green 环境]

    DeployGreen --> WaitGreen{Green 启动成功?}
    WaitGreen -->|否| GreenFail[Green 部署失败]
    GreenFail --> KeepBlue[保留 Blue 运行]
    KeepBlue --> NotifyFail[通知失败]

    WaitGreen -->|是| HealthCheck[健康检查]
    HealthCheck --> CheckHealth{检查通过?}
    CheckHealth -->|否| HealthFail[健康检查失败]
    HealthFail --> AutoRollback[自动回滚]

    CheckHealth -->|是| MinRuntime[等待最小运行时间]
...

    GREEN_HEALTH_CHECK --> GREEN_HEALTHY: 健康检查通过

    SWITCHING_50 --> SWITCHING_100: 验证通过
    ...

    DEPLOYING --> FAILED: 启动失败

    RUNNING --> FAILING: 异常检测
    RUNNING --> SUSPENDED: 用户暂停
    RUNNING --> FINISHED: 有限流完成
    RUNNING --> RESTARTING: 触发重启

    FAILING --> FAILED: 故障确认
    FAILING --> RESTARTING: 自动恢复

    RESTARTING --> CREATED: 重置状态
    RESTARTING --> RUNNING: 快速恢复

    SUSPENDED --> RUNNING: 用户恢复
    SUSPENDED --> CANCELED: 用户取消...

flowchart TD

    B -->|否| D{空闲时间 > 5min?}

    C --> G{目标 > 当前?}

    G -->|否| I[缩容操作]

    H --> J[创建新TM]
    J --> K[预加载状态]

    Q --> R{新事件到达?}
    R -->|是| S[冷启动流程]
    S --> T[从Checkpoint恢复]
    T --> U[恢复正常处理]

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Online: 初始化

    Online --> Buffering: 连接断开
    Online --> Online: 正常传输

    Buffering --> Flushing: 连接恢复
    Buffering --> Buffering: 写入缓存
    Buffering --> Compacting: 缓存满

    Compacting --> Buffering: 清理完成

    Flushing --> Online: 同步完成
    Flushing --> RetryWait: 同步失败

    RetryWait --> Flushing: 重试
    RetryWait --> Buffering: 再次断开

    Online --> [*]: 关闭

    note right of Buffering
        离线模式:
        - 数据写入本地存储
        - 定期检测连接
    end note

    note right ...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> RUNNING : 算子启动

    RUNNING --> ALIGNING : 收到第一个 B_n
    note right of ALIGNING
        多输入算子:
        - 缓存已对齐通道的后续数据
        - 继续处理未对齐通道的数据
    end note

    ALIGNING --> ALIGNED : 收到所有通道 B_n

    ALIGNED --> SNAPSHOTTING : 触发同步快照
    note right of SNAPSHOTTING
        - 同步阶段: 拷贝状态引用
        - 启动异步持久化线程
    end note

    SNAPSHOTTING --> BROADCASTING : 同步完成

    BROADCASTING --> RUNNING : 向下游转发 B_n

    RUNNING --> ACK_SENT : 异步完成并发送 ACK

    ACK_SENT --> [*] : Check...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle: 初始化

    Idle --> Loading: 收到更新请求
    Loading --> Validating: 模型下载完成
    Validating --> Ready: 验证通过
    Validating --> Failed: 验证失败

    Ready --> Active: 切换流量
    Active --> Draining: 新版本上线
    Draining --> Unloading: 请求处理完成
    Unloading --> Idle: 资源释放

    Active --> RollingBack: 异常检测
    RollingBack --> Idle: 回滚完成

    Failed --> Retry: 自动重试
    Retry --> Loading: 重试次数<3
    Retry --> Alerting: 重试次数≥3

    note right of Loading
        双缓冲策略:
        - 新模型加载...

sequenceDiagram
    participant U as 用户
    participant API as API网关
    participant Q as 查询服务
    participant E as Embedding服务
    participant V as 向量数据库
    participant L as LLM服务
    participant C as 缓存

    U->>API: 查询请求
    API->>Q: 转发请求

    Q->>C: 检查缓存
    alt 缓存命中
        C-->>Q: 返回缓存结果
    else 缓存未命中
        Q->>Q: 查询预处理
        Q->>E: 生成查询向量
        E-->>Q: 返回向量
        Q->>V: 相似度搜索
        V-->>Q: 返回Top-K文档
        Q->>Q: 构建Prompt
        Q->>L: 请求生成
        L-->>Q: 返回回答
        Q->>C...

sequenceDiagram
    participant C as Customer
    participant A as Agent
    participant T as Tech
    participant S as Supervisor

    C->>A: Inquiry

    alt Direct Answer
        A->>C: Response
    else Escalate to Tech
        A->>T: Transfer(K_Agent complex)
        T->>C: TechnicalResponse
        C->>T: {Satisfied | NeedMore}
    else Escalate to Supervisor
        A->>S: Escalate(K_Agent sensitive)
        S->>C: Resolution
    end

    SUSPECT --> ONLINE: 恢复成功
    SUSPECT --> OFFLINE: 连续失败

    RECOVERING --> ONLINE: 同步完成
    RECOVERING --> OFFLINE: 同步失败

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> 接收记录

    接收记录 --> 提取Key: 新记录到达

    提取Key --> 存储状态: 按Key存储
    存储状态 --> 触发匹配: 状态更新完成

    触发匹配 --> 检查其他流: 查询同Key记录
    检查其他流 --> 笛卡尔积匹配: 存在匹配记录
    检查其他流 --> LEFT处理: Join类型=LEFT且无匹配

    笛卡尔积匹配 --> 去重检查: 生成候选结果
    去重检查 --> 输出结果: 新签名
    去重检查 --> 丢弃重复: 已存在签名

    LEFT处理 --> 补NULL输出: 输出左表+NULL

    输出结果 --> [*]
    补NULL输出 --> [*]
    丢弃重复 --> [*]

    Adjust -->|Increase| Inc[Batch += 2]
    Adjust -->|Decrease| Dec[Batch /= 2]
    Adjust -->|Keep| Keep[No Change]

    Inc --> Start
    Dec --> Start
    Keep --> Start

    reasoning --> reflecting: 需要验证
    reflecting --> reasoning: 重新评估

    reasoning --> action_executing: 决策完成
    action_executing --> completed: 执行成功

    perceiving --> error: 感知失...

Checkpoint Success PREPARED --> ABORTED: abortTransaction()
Checkpoint Fail COMMITTED --> IDLE: 开始新事务 ABORTED --> IDLE: 清理后重新开始 note right of IN_TRANSACTION 记录写入 Kafka, 但标记为未提交 (Transaction Marker: OPEN) ...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> INITIALIZED: 启动

    INITIALIZED --> RUNNING: 分配初始分区

    RUNNING --> CHECKING_PARTITIONS: 定时触发发现
    CHECKING_PARTITIONS --> RUNNING: 无新分区
    CHECKING_PARTITIONS --> REASSIGNING: 发现新分区

    REASSIGNING --> RUNNING: 重新平衡完成

    RUNNING --> RESTORING: 故障恢复
    RESTORING --> RUNNING: 从 Checkpoint 恢复

    RUNNING --> [*]: 作业取消

    note right of CHECKING_PARTITIONS
        轮询 Kafka 元数据,
        间隔由 partition.discovery.interval.ms 配置
    end note

sequenceDiagram
    participant Event as 事件流
    participant Pred as 预测器
    participant Cache as 本地缓存
    participant Remote as 远程存储
    participant Op as 算子

    Event->>Pred: 访问 key=A
    Pred->>Remote: 预取 key=B, C
    Remote->>Cache: 加载状态 B, C
    Event->>Op: 处理 key=A
    Op->>Cache: 读取 A（命中）
    Event->>Op: 2ms 后访问 key=B
    Op->>Cache: 读取 B（预取命中）
    Note over Op: 延迟从远程访问降至本地访问

sequenceDiagram
    participant Source as 数据源
    participant Buffer as 输入缓冲区
    participant Processor as 流处理器
    participant Output as 输出 Sink

    Source->>Buffer: 发送 chunk (1)
    Source->>Buffer: 发送 chunk (2)

    Buffer->>Processor: 累积到 batch_size

    par 并行处理
        Processor->>Processor: 转换 batch 1
        Processor->>Processor: 转换 batch 2
    end

    Processor->>Output: 发送结果 (1)
    Processor->>Output: 发送结果 (2)

    Note over Buffer,Output: 背压:当 Output 慢时,Buffer 累积,Source 减速

sequenceDiagram
    participant JM as JobManager
    participant TM as TaskManager
    participant State as State Backend

    JM->>TM: Trigger Checkpoint (id=42)
    activate TM
    TM->>State: Snapshot operator state
    activate State
    State-->>TM: State handle
    deactivate State
    TM->>JM: Acknowledge (id=42, handle)
    deactivate TM
    JM->>JM: Aggregate acknowledgments
    JM->>JM: Complete Checkpoint

sequenceDiagram
    participant JM as JobManager
    participant TM as TaskManager

    JM->>JM: Start Checkpoint

    loop 对每个 TaskManager
        JM->>TM: Trigger Checkpoint
        activate TM
        TM->>TM: Perform snapshot
        alt 成功
            TM-->>JM: Acknowledge
        else 失败
            TM-->>JM: Decline
        end
        deactivate TM
    end

    JM->>JM: Complete or Abort

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> CREATED: 创建作业
    CREATED --> RUNNING: 启动执行
    RUNNING --> SUSPENDED: 暂停
    SUSPENDED --> RUNNING: 恢复
    RUNNING --> FAILING: 发生错误
    FAILING --> FAILED: 错误处理完成
    RUNNING --> FINISHED: 正常完成
    FAILED --> [*]
    FINISHED --> [*]

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> CREATED
    CREATED --> RUNNING : deploy
    RUNNING --> SUSPENDED : suspend
    SUSPENDED --> RUNNING : resume
    RUNNING --> FAILING : error
    FAILING --> FAILED : cleanup done
    RUNNING --> FINISHED : input exhausted
    RUNNING --> RESTARTING : restart policy
    RESTARTING --> CREATED : redeploy

stateDiagram-v2
    state "Checkpoint" as CP {
        [*] --> IN_PROGRESS
        IN_PROGRESS --> COMPLETED : all acks
        IN_PROGRESS --> FAILED : timeout/error
        COMPLETED --> [*]
        FAILED --> [*]
    }

    RUNNING --> CP : trigger
    CP --> RUNNING : done

sequenceDiagram
    participant T as 调度触发器
    participant R as 刷新引擎
    participant S as 源数据
    participant P as 处理算子
    participant St as 存储层

    T->>R: 触发刷新 (interval/事件)
    R->>S: 读取变更数据
    alt Full Refresh
        S-->>P: 全量数据
        P->>P: 完整计算
        P->>St: 覆盖写入
    else Incremental Refresh
        S-->>P: 增量数据 (Δ)
        P->>P: 增量计算 + 合并
        P->>St: 合并写入
    end
    St-->>R: 确认提交
    R->>T: 完成通知

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> CREATED: 创建工作流

    NODE_RUNNING --> NODE_FAILED: 节点失败

    NODE_COMPLETED --> RUNNING: 触发下游
    NODE_FAILED --> ERROR_HANDLING: 错误处理

    ERROR_HANDLING --> RUNNING: 重试成功
    ERROR_HANDLING --> FALLBACK: 执行fallback
    ERROR_HANDLING --> COMPENSATING: 执行补偿

    FALLBACK --> RUNNING: 继续执行
    COMPENSATING --> FAILED: 补偿完成

    RUNNING --> WAITING: 等待事件
    WAITI...

    end

        BP->>BP: flush immediately

    向量检索 --> 上下文组装: 检索完成
    上下文组装 --> LLM推理: 上下文就绪

    流式输出 --> [*]: 响应完成

    向量索引 --> 向量检索: 提供索引

    [*] --> Online: System Start
    
    Online --> PartitionDetected: Heartbeat Timeout
    Online --> Online: Process Event
    Online --> Online: Sync with Cloud
    Online --> Online: Health Check

    Assessing --> ShortPartition: Duration < 30s
    Assessing --> MediumPartition: 30s <= Duration < 5min
    Assessing --> LongPartition: Duration >= 5min
    
    ShortPartition --> Buffering: Buffer Events
    Buff...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> IDLE: Initialization

    IDLE --> SENDING: Credit > 0

    SENDING --> SENDING: Credit remains
    SENDING --> WAITING: Credit = 0
    SENDING --> [*]: All data sent

    WAITING --> SENDING: Credit received
    WAITING --> BUFFERED: Data pending

    BUFFERED --> SENDING: Credit received
    BUFFERED --> BACKPRESSURE: Buffer full

    BACKPRESSURE --> BUFFERED: Consumer processed
    BACKPRESSURE --> SENDING: Credit received

        - 请求频率 > 5 req/s
        - 页面停留 < 2s
        - 无鼠标轨迹
        - 固定访问模式

flowchart TD
    Start([开始]) --> Collect[收集系统指标]

    Collect --> Metrics{指标分析}

    Metrics -->|CPU > 80%| LoadHigh[负载过高]
    Metrics -->|CPU < 30%| LoadLow[负载过低]
    Metrics -->|方差 > 阈值| Imbalance[负载不均衡]
    Metrics -->|正常范围| Stable[系统稳定]

    LoadHigh --> CheckResource{检查资源}
    CheckResource -->|有空闲 TM| Allocate[分配槽位]
    CheckResource -->|资源不足| ScaleOut[扩容决策]

    LoadLow --> CheckCooldown{检查冷却期}
    CheckCooldown -->|已过| CheckMin{检查最小副本}
    CheckCooldown -->|未过| Stable
    CheckMin -->|> ...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> 正常运行: 系统启动

    正常运行 --> 健康检查: 周期性检查
    健康检查 --> 正常运行: 健康
    健康检查 --> 疑似故障: 1次失败

    疑似故障 --> 健康检查: 恢复
    疑似故障 --> 确认故障: 连续3次失败

    确认故障 --> 启动切换: RTO计时开始
    启动切换 --> DNS切换: 更新路由
    启动切换 --> 激活备用: 启动Flink

    DNS切换 --> 服务恢复: 流量导向
    激活备用 --> 服务恢复: 作业运行

    服务恢复 --> 数据同步: 追赶增量
    数据同步 --> 正常运行: 同步完成

    服务恢复 --> 降级模式: 数据差距大
    降级模式 --> 数据同步: 后台追赶

    正常运行 --> [*]: 系统关闭

    note right of 确认故障
        RPO = 数据丢失窗口
        RTO = 恢复时间目标
    end note

sequenceDiagram
    participant F as Flink Task
    participant B as Buffer
    participant ES as Elasticsearch

    loop 收集记录
        F->>B: add(record)
        B->>B: size++

        alt 达到批量条件
            B->>ES: POST /_bulk
            ES-->>B: 200 OK (items[])
            B->>B: clear()
        end
    end

    F->>B: checkpoint()
    B->>ES: flush remaining
    ES-->>B: all acked
    B-->>F: checkpoint complete

        搜索延迟高

classDiagram
    class FlinkML {
        +流式原生设计
        +毫秒级延迟
        +在线学习
        ~算法丰富度有限
        ~DL支持弱
    }

    class SparkMLlib {
        +算法丰富
        +成熟稳定
        +大规模批处理
        ~流式支持较弱
        ~高延迟
    }

    class TFX {
        +生产级ML平台
        +TF深度集成
        +完整MLOps
        ~学习曲线陡峭
        ~资源消耗大
    }

    class Alink {
        +Flink生态
        +100+算法
        +开源免费
        ~社区活跃度
    }

    FlinkML <|-- Alink : extends
    FlinkML ..> SparkMLlib : 批式对比
    FlinkML ..> TFX : ...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initializing: 系统启动

    Initializing --> WarmPool: 预置实例就绪

    WarmPool --> Processing: 事件到达

    Processing --> ScalingUp: 负载大于阈值
    ScalingUp --> Processing: 新实例就绪

    Processing --> ScalingDown: 负载小于阈值
    ScalingDown --> Processing: 实例释放完成
    ScalingDown --> WarmPool: 保留最小实例

    Processing --> Checkpointing: 缩容前检查点
    Checkpointing --> ScalingDown: 检查点完成

    Processing --> Error: 处理异常
    Error --> Recovering: 错误处理
    Recovering --> Processing: 恢复成功
    Rec...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle: 初始化
    
    state "运行中" as Running {
        [*] --> Processing
        Processing --> Waiting: 等待数据
        Waiting --> Processing: 收到数据
        Processing --> Error: 处理异常
    }
    
    Idle --> Running: 启动
    Running --> Paused: 暂停
    Paused --> Running: 恢复
    Running --> Stopped: 停止
    Paused --> Stopped: 停止
    Error --> Idle: 重置
    Stopped --> [*]: 清理资源

    [*] --> TRIGGERED: triggerCheckpoint()

    TRIGGERED --> IN_PROGRESS: tasks triggered

    IN_PROGRESS --> COMPLETED: all acks received
    IN_PROGRESS --> EXPIRED: timeout
    IN_PROGRESS --> FAILED: task failure
    IN_PROGRESS --> CANCELED: user cancel

    COMPLETED --> [*]
    EXPIRED --> [*]: cleanup
    FAILED --> [*]: cleanup
    CANCELED --> [*]: cleanup

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Initializing: Deploy

    Initializing --> Active: Job Running

    Active --> ScalingDown: No events > 5min
    ScalingDown --> Checkpointing: Trigger savepoint
    Checkpointing --> Zero: CP completed

    Zero --> ColdStart: Event arrives
    ColdStart --> Restoring: Fetch checkpoint
    Restoring --> WarmingUp: State referenced
    WarmingUp --> Active: Ready

    Active --> ScalingUp: High load
    ScalingUp --> Active: Resources added

    ScalingDown --> Active...

flowchart TD
    Start[输入: p.A 类型选择] --> Norm[路径规范化]
    Norm --> CheckEnv{检查环境 Γ}

    CheckEnv -->|Γ(p) = T| Lookup[查找 T 的成员 L]
    CheckEnv -->|p 未绑定| Error1[类型错误: 未定义路径]

    Lookup -->|T ∋ {A: S..U}| Bound{检查边界}
    Lookup -->|成员不存在| Error2[类型错误: 无此类型成员]

    Bound -->|需要 S <: p.A <: U| EqCheck{路径等价检查}

    EqCheck -->|存在 q ~ p| Reuse[复用 q.A 的已知类型]
    EqCheck -->|无等价路径| Infer[推断类型为 U]

    Reuse --> Return[返回类型]
    Infer --> Return

    style Start fill:#fff9c4,stroke:#f57f17
    style Re...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> submitted: 用户提交任务

    submitted --> working: Agent 接受任务
    submitted --> failed: 验证失败
    submitted --> cancelled: 用户取消

    working --> input_required: 需要用户输入
    working --> completed: 执行成功
    working --> failed: 执行错误
    working --> cancelled: 超时/取消

    input_required --> working: 提供输入
    input_required --> cancelled: 放弃任务

    completed --> [*]: 返回 Artifact
    failed --> [*]: 返回错误信息
    cancelled --> [*]: 清理资源

    note right of working
        SSE 推送状态更新
  ...

        - 等待物理清理

        - RocksDB墓碑标记
        - 下次Compaction删除

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> IDLE: 初始化

    IDLE --> REQUESTING: 请求子分区
    REQUESTING --> CONNECTED: 连接建立

    CONNECTED --> SENDING: 有信用值 & 有数据
    SENDING --> CONNECTED: 信用值耗尽

    CONNECTED --> WAITING_CREDIT: 信用值=0
    WAITING_CREDIT --> CONNECTED: 收到AddCredit

    SENDING --> BACKPRESSURED: 下游处理缓慢
    BACKPRESSURED --> SENDING: 信用值恢复

    CONNECTED --> ERROR: 网络异常
    SENDING --> ERROR: 连接断开
    WAITING_CREDIT --> ERROR: 超时

    ERROR --> RECOVERING: 触发重连
    RECOVERING --> REQUESTING: 重新请求
...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Online: 启动

    Online --> Offline: 连接断开
    Online --> Online: 正常传输

    Offline --> Reconnecting: 定时重试
    Offline --> Offline: 写入本地缓存

    Reconnecting --> Online: 连接成功
    Reconnecting --> Offline: 重试失败

    Online --> Syncing: 检测到缓存数据

    Syncing --> Online: 同步完成
    Syncing --> Offline: 同步中断

    note right of Online
        行为: 实时传输到云端
        缓存: 可选写本地
    end note

    note right of Offline
        行为: 写入 RocksDB
        监控: 连接状态
    end note

    note right...

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Processing: 数据摄入

    Processing --> Success: 处理成功
    Processing --> ValidationError: 数据错误
    Processing --> TransientError: 瞬态错误
    Processing --> FatalError: 致命错误

    Success --> [*]: 提交 Sink

    ValidationError --> DLQ: 发送到死信队列
    DLQ --> Alert: 触发告警
    Alert --> ManualReview: 人工处理
    ManualReview --> Retry: 修正后重试
    Retry --> Processing

    TransientError --> Backoff: 指数退避
    Backoff --> Processing: 重试
    Backoff --> CircuitOpen: 超过阈值
    CircuitOpen -...

sequenceDiagram
    participant F as Flink Checkpoint
    participant S as JDBC Sink
    participant X as XA Resource
    participant D as Database

    F->>S: triggerCheckpoint()
    S->>S: flush pending batches
    S->>X: XA start
    X->>D: prepare transaction
    D-->>X: prepared
    X-->>S: XA end
    S-->>F: checkpoint complete

    F->>F: save checkpoint

    F->>S: notifyCheckpointComplete()
    S->>X: XA commit
    X->>D: commit transaction
    D-->>X: committed
    X-->>S: done

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Open: create_stream()

    Open --> Pending: next() called
    Pending --> Ready: data available
    Pending --> Cancelled: cancel() called
    Ready --> Open: value returned

    Open --> End: stream exhausted
    Ready --> End: last element

    Cancelled --> Closed: cleanup complete
    End --> Closed: resources released

    Closed --> [*]

    note right of Pending
        Producer rate > Consumer rate
        → Backpressure applied
    end note

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> DUAL_WRITE: 启动CDC+双写

    DUAL_WRITE --> VALIDATE: 全量快照完成
    VALIDATE --> DUAL_WRITE: 校验失败(回滚)
    VALIDATE --> CATCH_UP: 校验通过

    CATCH_UP --> SWITCH: CDC Lag < 1s
    CATCH_UP --> VALIDATE: 延迟异常(重新验证)

    SWITCH --> ROLLBACK: 切换异常
    SWITCH --> CLEANUP: 切换成功

    ROLLBACK --> DUAL_WRITE: 恢复双写

    CLEANUP --> [*]: 下线旧系统

    note right of DUAL_WRITE
        旧系统: 100%读写
        新系统: CDC同步+双写
    end note

    note right of VALIDATE
        行级/聚合级比对
        一致率>99...

    RUNNING --> FAILED: 执行异常
    RUNNING --> CANCELLED: 用户取消
    FAILED --> RESTARTING: 触发故障恢复
    RESTARTING --> CREATED: 重新创建Execution
    CANCELLED --> [*]
    FINISHED --> [*]

sequenceDiagram
    participant Kafka as Kafka 数据源
    participant RW as RisingWave
    participant UDF as Rust UDF
    participant MV as 物化视图
    participant API as 推荐 API

    loop 实时数据流
        Kafka->>RW: 用户行为事件
        RW->>RW: 窗口聚合 (24h)
    end

    API->>RW: 查询用户特征
    RW->>UDF: 调用 compute_user_features
    UDF->>UDF: 计算统计特征
    UDF->>UDF: 计算熵/频率
    UDF-->>RW: 返回结构体
    RW->>MV: 增量更新
    MV-->>API: 返回特征向量

stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> Idle

    Idle --> Processing: 接收到记录

    Processing --> WaitingIO: 发起异步I/O
    Processing --> Producing: 计算完成

    WaitingIO --> Processing: I/O完成
    WaitingIO --> Cancelled: 取消信号

    Producing --> Backpressure: 输出缓冲区满
    Producing --> Idle: 批处理完成

    Backpressure --> Producing: 缓冲区可用
    Backpressure --> Cancelled: 超时/取消

    Cancelled --> Idle: 清理完成

    Processing --> Error: 处理异常
    WaitingIO --> Error: I/O错误

    Error --> Idle: 错误处理完成
